## Collections.IReadOnlyConvertingResultMapConstructorParams.onConversionError property

Error handling behavior for conversion failures during iteration. Defaults to `'ignore'` (silently skip failed conversions).

**Signature:**

```typescript
onConversionError?: ConversionErrorHandling;
```
